contexts.context: ..., he continued to write several other dramas with <mark>provocative</mark> political content. [MW]  Brown, Charles...
...much an object of pity, as when bitter <mark>provocation</mark> has impelled her to assume the deportment of haughtiness...
...unassuming mind animated with that fire which, by the <mark>provocation</mark> of circumstances, will give to the kindest heart...
